xml.parsers.expat.model/xmlparser/Defaul.name: DefaultHandler
xml.parsers.expat.model/xmlparser/Defaul.description: Called for any characters in the XML document for which no applicable handler has been specified. This means characters that are part of a construct which could be reported, but for which no handler has been supplied.

info.excerpt: Called for any characters in the XML document for which no applicable handler has been specified. This means characters that are part of a construct which could be reported, but for which no handler h...

xml.parsers.expat.model/xmlparser/Defaul.name: DefaultHandlerExpand
xml.parsers.expat.model/xmlparser/Defaul.description: This is the same as the DefaultHandler(), but doesn’t inhibit expansion of internal entities. The entity reference will not be passed to the default handler.

info.excerpt: This is the same as the DefaultHandler(), but doesn’t inhibit expansion of internal entities. The entity reference will not be passed to the default handler.
